name: TDG Gold Corp.
summary: TDG Gold Corp. acquires and explores mineral resources properties located in northeastern British Columbia. The company explores for gold, silver, copper, lead, and zinc deposits. It holds interests in the Baker-Shasta property covering an area of 6,000 hectares; the Oxide Peak property covering an area of 8,400 hectares; the Bot property covers an area of 8,600 hectares; and the Mets property covering an area of 200 hectares. The company is headquartered in White Rock, Canada.
